name: spreadsheet-peek
description: Preview and render local Excel, spreadsheet, CSV, TSV, ODS, and workbook files inline with wolfxl.
long_description: Spreadsheet Peek adds read-only MCP tools and an interactive MCP App grid for local .xlsx, .xlsm, .xls, .xlsb, .ods, .csv, .tsv, and comma-delimited .txt files. It uses the installed wolfxl binary for parsing, keeps workbook contents local, and helps agents preview or inspect spreadsheet paths before processing them.

tools.name: preview_workbook
tools.description: Preview a local spreadsheet, Excel workbook, CSV, TSV, ODS, or sheet by file path; returns bounded structured workbook data and a readable table summary.

tools.name: open_workbook_viewer
tools.description: Render a local spreadsheet, Excel workbook, CSV, TSV, ODS, or sheet inline from a file path using the Spreadsheet Peek grid viewer.
